message:
test(robot): golden snapshot for ft robot state two-pane wire shape

Adds crates/frankenterm-core/tests/robot_state_golden.rs and its
fixture crates/frankenterm-core/tests/fixtures/robot_state_two_pane.json,
pinning the canonical JSON serialization of StateWithTextData — the
`ft robot state --include-text` response envelope — for a deterministic
2-pane mock wezterm (local bash + ssh:remote vim).

Coverage (4 tests):
- `robot_state_two_pane_matches_golden` — the main golden assertion.
  Serializes StateWithTextData { panes, tail_lines, escapes_included,
  pane_text } and compares to the fixture, with UPDATE_GOLDEN=1
  regeneration support and an `.actual.json` side-write on drift.
- `robot_state_golden_is_deterministic` — serializes 3× back-to-back
  and asserts byte-identical output, guarding against HashMap
  iteration-order or other non-determinism leaking into the golden.
- `robot_state_pane_state_mapping_preserves_domain_override` —
  regression guard on PaneInfo.domain_name (explicit "ssh:remote")
  surfacing through `inferred_domain()` into PaneStateData.domain.
- `robot_state_pane_text_variants_serialize_distinct_tags` — inline
  assertion that PaneTextResult::Ok → {status:"ok"} and Error →
  {status:"error"} so diff reviewers can eyeball the enum contract.

The golden captures both variants of PaneTextResult (Ok with text,
Error with code+message+hint), both PaneStateData domain shapes
(local, ssh:remote), and all optional/defaulted fields so renames,
removals, or `#[serde(default)]` changes to either struct or the
PaneTextResult tagged enum will diverge from the committed fixture
and force a deliberate UPDATE_GOLDEN regeneration.

Regenerate:
  UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 cargo test -p frankenterm-core \
    --no-default-features --features asupersync-runtime \
    --test robot_state_golden

Verified: 4/4 tests pass locally (CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-pane5-target).
Domain: snapshot golden (pane 5).

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+{
+  "escapes_included": false,
+  "pane_text": {
+    "1": {
+      "status": "ok",
+      "text": "$ echo hello\nhello\n$ ",
+      "truncated": false,
+      "truncation_info": null
+    },
+    "2": {
+      "code": "pane_unreachable",
+      "hint": "check network connectivity to remote host",
+      "message": "ssh domain unreachable",
+      "status": "error"
+    }
+  },
+  "panes": [
+    {
+      "cwd": "file:///home/agent",
+      "domain": "local",
+      "ignore_reason": null,
+      "observed": true,
+      "pane_id": 1,
+      "pane_uuid": null,
+      "tab_id": 10,
+      "title": "claude",
+      "window_id": 100
+    },
+    {
+      "cwd": "file://remote/srv/repo",
+      "domain": "ssh:remote",
+      "ignore_reason": null,
+      "observed": true,
+      "pane_id": 2,
+      "pane_uuid": null,
+      "tab_id": 10,
+      "title": "editor",
+      "window_id": 100
+    }
+  ],
+  "tail_lines": 20
+}
